# Taylor Architecture Studio
> Residential architecture firm in Boulder County, Colorado

Taylor Architecture Studio is a boutique residential architecture firm founded and led by Nicole Taylor Nutting, a licensed architect with a Master of Architecture from CU Denver (2011) and a Bachelor of Environmental Design from CU Boulder. The firm specializes in custom home design, home additions and renovations, ADU (accessory dwelling unit) design, construction documents, and permitting services throughout Boulder County, Colorado.

## Services
- Custom Home Design: Full-service residential architecture from concept through construction documents
- Additions & Renovations: Seamless integration of new spaces with existing home character
- ADU Design: Accessory dwelling units navigating Boulder County zoning requirements
- Construction Documents: Complete permit-ready drawing sets for builders
- Permitting: Full permitting process management with the building department

## Service Area
Boulder, Lafayette, Louisville, Superior, Longmont, and Erie, Colorado (Boulder County)

## Notable Work
Marshall Fire rebuild projects in Louisville and Superior, CO (2022–2025)

## Contact

## Credentials
Nicole Taylor Nutting — Licensed Architect, State of Colorado
Master of Architecture, CU Denver (2011)
Bachelor of Environmental Design, CU Boulder
